name: Rebound: A Year Of Triumph And Tragedy At Yeshiva University Basketball
original_name: Rebound: A Year Of Triumph And Tragedy At Yeshiva University Basketball
overview: Rebound is an extraordinary documentary about the 2023-2024 Yeshiva University Maccabees basketball team. The film portrays a team facing immense emotional and physical adversity playing in the aftermath of October 7th.
